# Traxis Ecosystem Constellation

*Auto-generated by scan_projects.py on 2026-05-17 00:13. Do not hand-edit.*

## Project Status

**31 active** | 2 complete | 2 retired

- [+] **P1: ProShop Automations** — Fusion 360 add-in connecting to ProShop ERP via GraphQL API for work order browsing and CAM data export.
- [+] **P2: YCM Post Processor Development** — Custom Fusion 360 post processor for YCM NTC1600LY CNC lathe with live tooling.
- [+] **P3: Customer Portal** — Customer portal for RFQ submission, order tracking, and photo documentation.
- [+] **P4: Inspection Print and ProShop Automation** — AI-powered dimension extraction from engineering drawings with ProShop ERP integration.
- [+] **P5: Hyundai Post Processor Development** — Hyundai KF5600ii Fanuc post processor for CNC machining.
- [+] **P6: Chevalier Post Processor Development** — Fusion 360 post processor for Chevalier EM2040L milling machine with Fanuc control.
- [+] **P7: Customer Outreach** — Reduce customer concentration risk by acquiring new customers near Austin.
- [~] **P8: Catastrophe Planning** — Strategic risk planning for machining company business continuity.
- [+] **P9: Shop Floor Cameras** — Shop floor kiosk for GoPro photo capture and ProShop work order uploads.
- [-] **P10: Conversational ProShop** — Natural language interface for querying ProShop ERP via Claude.
- [~] **P11: ProShop Mobile App** — Native iOS app for ProShop ERP shop floor queries using SwiftUI and FastAPI backend.
- [+] **P12: FASData Implementation** — FANUC CNC connectivity test and live machine monitoring system.
- [=] **P13: Preventive Maintenance** — Battery backup labels for CNC drives. Minimal scope -- just label files.
- [+] **P14: Workstation Display (IPC)** — Chrome extension for shop floor work order tracking and measurement entry.
- [~] **P15: ProShop Replacement Research** — Research and architecture planning for ProShop ERP API integration.
- [=] **P16: Fusion Tool Library Product ID Changer** — Audits and corrects Product IDs in Fusion 360 tool libraries for ProShop ERP integration.
- [+] **P17: COTS Crib Kiosk** — Touch-screen kiosk for COTS tool inventory checkout via QR scanning.
- [+] **P18: ProShop Message Notifier** — Chrome extension and desktop overlay for ProShop message alerts on shop floor.
- [+] **P19: Shop Scheduler** — Flask web app scheduling shop jobs by machine readiness and tool availability.
- [+] **P20: Traxis Data** — Analyzes ProShop ERP data to identify why a CNC machine shop loses money despite being busy.
- [+] **P21: Haas Communication Investigation** — Raspberry Pi Zero bridge for Haas CNC machine USB and RS-232 communication.
- [+] **P22: Tool Assembly Management** — Touch-screen kiosk for tool assembly management with ProShop sync and label printing.
- [+] **P23: Air Compressor Communication** — Flask web GUI for monitoring and scheduling EMAX 20HP rotary screw compressor via Modbus TCP.
- [-] **P24: Digital Help For Rene** — Automates Rene Maldonado's ProShop workload at Traxis Manufacturing.
- [+] **P25: Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)** — Always-running data quality agent auditing Traxis Manufacturing ERP and machine monitoring.
- [+] **P26: SMT Post Processor Development** — Creates and maintains ProShop equipment records for SMT machines and components.
- [+] **P27: Accounting Ingest** — Ingests vendor invoices and purchase orders into ProShop and QuickBooks Online.
- [+] **P28: Proshop API Usage** — Monitors ProShop GraphQL API usage across Traxis projects.
- [~] **P29: Rollo Printer App** — Windows system tray app that prints PDFs to Rollo 4x6 thermal printer with auto-rescaling.
- [+] **P30: Material Label Extension** — Chrome extension that injects print-label buttons on ProShop pages.
- [+] **P31: Photo Upload Service** — Flask photo capture service for shop floor tablets queued to ProShop.
- [~] **P32: Breakeven Dashboard** — Dashboard visualizes CNC machine runtime against weekly breakeven targets.
- [+] **P33: Tool Library Updater VPO Writer** — CLI utility for managing ProShop ERP tool library entries with AI spec lookup.
- [+] **P34: Chrome Web Store Ops Watcher** — Monitors Chrome Web Store for extension lifecycle events via Microsoft Graph API.
- [+] **P35: Purchasing Automation** — One-tap purchasing automation with approval queue and vendor email drafting.

## Critical Seams

Cross-project contracts — breaking these silently breaks a downstream project.

- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** Overseer expects each HTTP service to expose a health URL returning JSON. Validators in VALIDATORS dict must match service names in SERVICES_CONFIG. P25 services use PYTHON_EXE (not PYTHONW_EXE) with -u flag. AGENT_DIR path must match P25 folder location. **All managed Flask services expose POST /api/shutdown** — Overseer's `_stop_process` POSTs there first (2s timeout) and waits 5s for natural exit before terminate()/kill(). Paths and Python interpreter are env-driven via `TRAXIS_BASE_DIR`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_PYTHON`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_PYTHONW`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_AIRCOMPRESSOR_PYTHONW` (defaults preserve .71's `TRAXIS` user paths). Per-service OAuth secrets (`PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET_BRIDGE` for MsgNotifier+COTSCribKiosk
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET_TOOLKIOSK` for ToolAssemblyKiosk) injected via env={} in SERVICES_CONFIG.
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** P9 sends label PNGs to P22 print_service at http://10.1.1.242:5002/api/print-image — payload format {image_base64

- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** 180 DPI.

- **P25 (Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)):** service_wrapper.py launches Overseer and restarts on crash (exponential backoff 30-300s). **Leader election removed 2026-05-10** — srv-01 is sole production host going forward; no more `service_heartbeat.json`. Health endpoints must respond JSON with `"status": "ok"` for Overseer validation. agent_scheduler.py runs check_reminders.py/run_audit.py/scan_projects.py as subprocesses from PROJECT_ROOT. OVERSEER_PYTHON + base path derive from `TRAXIS_PYTHON` + `TRAXIS_BASE_DIR` env vars.
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** ProShop equipment records use `equipmentType` short prefixes (CA
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** MT
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** OM
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** REG
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** PUMP
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** etc.) — pick from existing prefixes when possible to keep grouping consistent. Update/delete mutations key on auto-built Tool # (`equipmentType + equipmentNumber`)
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** NOT `equipmentNumber`. All string fields must be ASCII-only with no newlines (ProShop doesn't unescape JSON unicode/`\n`); use ` | ` as separator. Equipment URL pattern is `/procnc/equipment/{equipmentType}/{tool}`. Image sub-table is UI-only.
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** PO line items use `toolNumber` field (not `itemNumber`) for tools and COTS. `orderNumber` field carries brand + EDP. `shipTo` defaults to Traxis MFG 511 E St Elmo Rd. updatePurchaseOrder mutation: `id` is a separate arg (not inside `data`)
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** poItems use selector {field: "orderNumber"

- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** `update_customer_po`) — beginsession → query-param token → auto-refresh on 401. Every other ProShop mutation stays on OAuth. ORDERBY TxnDate DESC MAXRESULTS 1`) and reusing line[0]'s account; falls back to first COGS

Tool label uses three-layer data cascade: iframe contentDocument → top-level DOM → GraphQL API (`tools` query with session cookie). CWS extension ID used in registry policy on all shop PCs — changing it requires re-running deploy script. Privacy policy at https://claude-wolfgang.github.io/traxis-privacy/ — must be kept aligned with the manifest's `host_permissions` and `permissions` lists (mismatch is the #1 CWS rejection trigger; the policy lives in repo `claude-wolfgang/traxis-privacy` on GitHub Pages
- **P30 (Material Label Extension):** separate from this code repo).
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** Port 5003 must not conflict with other services. Photo storage at photo-uploader/data/photos/ syncs via Dropbox. Upload worker consumes ProShop web UI via headless Selenium with `--disable-popup-blocking` (required for the COTS popup path). Written description URL pattern: `{BASE}/procnc/parts/{customer}/{partNumber}$formName=writtenDescription&opId={opNumber}`. **COTS upload (added 2026-05-15)** uses a separate `window.open()` popup at `{BASE}/procnc/procncAdmin/fileserver/editpicture$parent_submit=true&...&page=<UUID>&token=<CSRF>&isNew=yes` — the click handler is on an `<a id="fn*">` wrapper around the "Add picture" button
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** requires `ActionChains` trusted-gesture click
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** and auto-commits the parent so no parent SAVE CHANGES is needed; COTS detail URL is the **prefixed** form `/ots/{TYPE}/{TYPE}-{NUMBER}` (bare form 404s). **WO-page fallback (added 2026-05-13):** when the op's writtenDescription URL produces no usable CKEditor form (no CHECKOUT button within 25s
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** OR checkout fails
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** OR CKEditor not ready within 30s)
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** worker retries on `{BASE}/procnc/workorders/{wo}` and reports success with a non-error info note ("Operation had no written description — uploaded to WO main page instead.") rendered neutral grey on /queue. Only triggers for entity_type=workorder. **ProShop's per-CKEditor-field ceiling is ~240KB**: base64-inline shrink loop tries 6 dimensions × 4 qualities (1200→360 × 75→30); after 2 photos stack onto the same WO main page via fallback
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** subsequent attempts genuinely cannot fit and fail with "page may be full". OAuth scope requires: parts:rwdp

## Open Items Requiring Wolfgang

- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** Contact Adion Systems to grant users:w scope; test spindle load readings on running machines
- **P3 (Customer Portal):** Test UploadCam photo system on tablets and validate P-touch printer integration with shop floor workflow
- **P4 (Inspection Print and ProShop Automation):** Decision on ITAR compliance path (local-only mode vs. Google Assured Workloads migration); testing on ITAR-controlled drawings
- **P5 (Hyundai Post Processor Development):** Repost parts 10019 and 10097 100M using fixed post processor and verify probe cycles execute cleanly
- **P7 (Customer Outreach):** Send outreach email to Kevin Kaufmann at Saronic Technologies
- **P8 (Catastrophe Planning):** Decide on support option (AI-assisted or human professional) for customer outreach activities
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** Obtain PROSHOP_CLIENT_ID, PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET, and QR code specification from ProShop administrator
- **P11 (ProShop Mobile App):** Acquire Mac computer for native iOS development; request expanded API scope from ProShop admin
- **P12 (FASData Implementation):** Fill in IP addresses for all 8+ machines in the machine inventory table.
- **P14 (Workstation Display (IPC)):** Deploy restyle and op info tabs changes to shop floor for operator feedback; verify ProShop API remains enabled in System Config
- **P15 (ProShop Replacement Research):** Decision on whether to proceed with replacement vs. maintain current integration; follow up with ProShop on change request status
- **P17 (COTS Crib Kiosk):** Test the kiosk on shop floor; verify QR scanner works with HP touchscreen; confirm employee name list accuracy
- **P18 (ProShop Message Notifier):** Deploy Flask server to production; install Chrome extension on shop floor worker machines; test audio alerts on target hardware
- **P19 (Shop Scheduler):** Test /api/priorities/report endpoint and provide feedback on job ranking accuracy and bottleneck diagnosis
- **P20 (Traxis Data):** Rene must export QuickBooks P&L, bank statements, and utility bills per RENE_DATA_COLLECTION_GUIDE.md, then run anonymize.py before analysis can proceed
- **P21 (Haas Communication Investigation):** Try swapping TX/RX wires on the MAX3232 board. 5 min physical task.
- **P22 (Tool Assembly Management):** Delete corrupted Chrome profile at %LOCALAPPDATA%\ToolKioskChromeProfile to fix crash loop
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Decide whether to accept schedule-only control or pursue alternative start/stop methods (hardware relay, timer manipulation workarounds)
- **P25 (Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)):** Deploy service_wrapper.py to collector PC and run install_service.bat as Admin
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** Add images to CA153 record, fill install dates on CA152/CA153, survey floor for other AW-A units
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** Approve QBO production credentials and configure live environment access
- **P29 (Rollo Printer App):** Run PyInstaller rebuild command and smoke-test with real UPS PDF after rebuild
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** Schedule and perform on-site testing of Phase 3 features (Overseer dashboard, tablet QR scan, auto-restart)
- **P32 (Breakeven Dashboard):** Verify machines.json configuration and database connection path
- **P35 (Purchasing Automation):** Wolfgang: delete test VPO 263106 from ProShop UI; complete --live test for LUB-116 repeat-purchase validation
